Hanging Pieces.description: Features detecting undefended or inadequately defended pieces that can be captured

Overloaded Defenders.coaching_question: Is any defender doing too much?
Overloaded Defenders.description: Features detecting pieces defending multiple targets simultaneously, creating tactical vulnerabilities

Passed Pawns.coaching_question: Can I create or push a passed pawn?
Passed Pawns.description: Features detecting passed pawn creation, advancement, and promotion opportunities

King & Pawn Endgames.coaching_question: Do I know the right endgame technique?
King & Pawn Endgames.description: Features for king activity, pawn endgame technique, and simplified position play

Rook Endgames.coaching_question: Am I playing this rook endgame correctly?
Rook Endgames.description: Features for rook endgame technique including R+P vs R, Q vs R, and active rook play

Forcing Moves.coaching_question: Am I considering all checks, captures, and threats?
Forcing Moves.description: Features detecting forcing move sequences including checks, captures, and immediate threats

Discovered Attacks.coaching_question: Can I reveal a hidden attack?
Discovered Attacks.description: Features detecting discovered attacks, revealed threats, and hidden tactical motifs

Back Rank.description: Features detecting back rank vulnerabilities, weak king shelter, and mating threats

Piece Activity.coaching_question: Are all my pieces doing something useful?
Piece Activity.description: Features for piece placement, centralization, and repositioning to active squares

Opening Play.coaching_question: Am I developing pieces and controlling the center?
Opening Play.description: Features for opening development, piece coordination, and early game decisions
